Verify a slot round

Every spin on Matrix Spins is derived from HMAC-SHA256(server_seed, client_seed:nonce:round). Before you bet, you see sha256(server_seed) — the commit. After the spin, the seed is revealed. This page recomputes the reel stops entirely in your browser, so you can confirm the server didn't swap seeds after seeing your bet.

From your history

Checking for a session…

Paste values manually

Got these values from a screenshot, a friend, or the live-slot modal? Paste them here to recompute the outcome locally. No data leaves your browser.

Result
